User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system (Landlord or Admin).

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Represents a physical real estate asset.

Tenant.title: Tenant
Tenant.description: Represents a person renting a property.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of platform user profiles. Access control: Users can read/write their own profile. Users with role 'super-admin' in their own document at /users/{request.auth.uid} have full global access to all user documents.

/properties/{propertyId}.description: Global properties collection. Access control: Landlords can read/write properties where landlordId matches their UID. Users with role 'super-admin' in their own profile document at /users/{request.auth.uid} have full global access to list and manage all properties.

/tenants/{tenantId}.description: Global tenants collection. Access control: Landlords can read/write tenants where landlordId matches their UID. Users with role 'super-admin' in their own profile document at /users/{request.auth.uid} have full global access to list and manage all tenants.

/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Global invoices collection. Access control: Landlords can read/write invoices where landlordId matches their UID. Users with role 'super-admin' in their own profile document at /users/{request.auth.uid} have full global access to list and manage all invoices.
